reviews.author: Betty
reviews.text: He’s officially my go to! Very professional very fast , communicates well is knowledgeable and great prices! I would recommend him to anyone. Was having issues with my brakes and he did not leave until he figured it out and fixed it!

reviews.author: Serena Virani
reviews.text: Thermy provided outstanding service from start to finish. My brake pads were repaired quickly and efficiently, and the entire process was smooth and stress-free. In addition to the excellent workmanship, the customer service was exceptional—we had a great conversation that made the experience even better. I truly appreciated the professionalism, speed, and attention to detail. I will absolutely be returning for future service and highly recommend Thermy to anyone in need of reliable auto repairs.

reviews.author: trudy Jackson
reviews.text:
My name is Miss Jackson, My appointment was at 9:00 AM Thermys called me approximately at 8:45 AM and told me he was 15 minutes away on time. He was very respectful and did an awesome job. I woke my son up and asked him. Did he need any mechanic work on his vehicle? Sure enough he did Thermys Took a look at his vehicle and did the work,I would genuinely like to say if anything forbid if it does happen to our vehicle he would be the man we will call
Thank You much

reviews.author: Anqwanette Grant
reviews.text: Great experience he came quick did my brakes fast with no problems. He even picked up my parts for me I didn’t have to do anything but pay him which is also a plus because it was a very reasonable price.. will definitely recommend and use him again… thanks Thermy!!!🥰

reviews.author: Jasmine Jones
reviews.text: Was in atl for the weekend looked on google for someone who could put my rotors on fast that being I had to be on the road to travel back home.. He was very professional he def went above and beyond making sure ALL MY TIRES were tighten and got before I left out!! I’ll def recommend him for anything def my go to when I’m in town thank you!!
